---
title: "Class 10"
author: "Dhruvi Sheth 22294"
date: "28 Jan 2026"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_notebook: default
---

```{r}
vector_sample_1 <- c(1:10)
vector_sample_1[-1]
```

```{r}
status <- c("yes","no")
vector_sample_2 <- sample(status, 10, replace = T)
vector_sample_2
```


### Dataframe

```{r}
dataframe_sample <- data.frame(vector_sample_1, vector_sample_2)
```

```{r}
head(dataframe_sample)
```

```{r}
str(dataframe_sample)
```

```{r}
dataframe_sample[,2]
```

```{r}
#skip the second row
dataframe_sample[-2,-2]
```

## matrices

```{r}
matrix_sample <- matrix(c(1:10),2,5)
# put 1 to 10 in 2 rows and 5 columns
# by_ rows is false by default

matrix_sample
```

```{r}
matrix_sample_1<- matrix(c(1:10),2,2)
matrix_sample_1
```

```{r}
matrix_sample_2 <- matrix(c(1:10),2,6)
matrix_sample_2
```


## Arrays

```{r}
array_sample <- array (c(1:10), dim = c(2,5,3))
array_sample
```

```{r}
array_sample_1 <- array (c(1:20), dim = c(2,5,3))
array_sample_1
```

## List

```{r}
list_sample <- list(vector_sample_1, dataframe_sample, matrix_sample, array_sample)

## in each index, each element in a list
```

```{r}
list_sample
```
